/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/container_test.dir/container_test.cpp.o -o container_test  ../common/libcommon.a -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_gl-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu_net-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_stc-3.2 ../common/libgal.a ../bitmaps_png/libbitmaps.a ../polygon/libpolygon.a -lGLEW -lcairo -lpixman-1 -lGL -lGLU -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -lwx_gtk3u_gl-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu_net-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_stc-3.2
